title: ANYDOOR PLACE COORDINATED ENTRY - 211info
text: ANYDOOR PLACE MCMINNVILLE DAY CENTER ANYDOOR PLACE COORDINATED ENTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing-related coordinated entry. Services may include assistance with past-due rent and rental deposit support, ongoing housing assistance, connection to help with utilities, assistance with apartment searching, and referrals to shelters and other local resources. Also provides case management. 327 SW Adams Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and families with minor children Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon (503) 687-5783 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 687-5783 Main phone Main phone (503) 687-5783 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, walk in, or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
